replies.msg: Does LIHKG accept foreign ISP emails?

I don’t know if that is a good idea. The Chinese propaganda machine already have the network overseas to influence opinions as you can see on twitter YouTube and reddit. That will be a dream for them to spread fake news.
I’m a HKer studying in Australia at the moment and I used my uni email to register LIHKG account a while ago, so fingers crossed foreign ISP should be accepted.
